title: Tai
content:
{{Top}} {{Otheruses}} {{Expand|all sections}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image=[[File:Tai-TheRiseOfKyloRen3.jpg]] |name=Tai |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[28 ABY]], [[Minemoon]]''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]'' |species=[[Human]][[The Rise of Kylo Ren 1|''The Rise of Kylo Ren'' 1]] |gender=[[Gender|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color|Dark]] |feathers= |eyes=Blue |skin=Light |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Jedi Order]] |masters=[[Luke Skywalker]] |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You don't know him. What Ben's had to deal with. I don't care what he said. He would never do this. Ben doesn't need to be ''hunted''. He needs our ''help''.|Tai, to Voe|}} '''Tai''' was a [[Force-sensitive]] [[human]] [[Gender|male]] [[Jedi]] [[Padawan]] who lived during the [[New Republic Era]], having joined the [[Jedi Order]] under [[Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker]], Tai [[Jedi training|learned]] the ways of [[the Force]] alongside other students, including Skywalker's [[Skywalker family|nephew]] [[Ben Solo]]. He was returning to [[Ossus]] from an off-[[Planet|world]] mission with fellow [[Jedi]] [[Hennix]] and [[Voe]] when the [[Jedi Temple of Luke Skywalker|Jedi training temple]] was [[Destruction of the Jedi Temple|destroyed]]. Finding the [[Jedi temple|temple]] [[Fire|ablaze]], they confronted Solo who overpowered the trio before retreating to [[Snoke]]. The three Jedi pursued him, believing he was responsible for the [[death]] of their master, although Tai remained adamant that Solo was not a murderer. However, after Solo [[Battle of Elphrona|accidentally killed]] Hennix on [[Elphrona]], Tai concluded that his former friend was lost and set himself to track him down with Voe so they could kill him. When they traveled to the [[Minemoon]] to [[Skirmish on the Minemoon|confront]] Solo and the [[Knights of Ren]], Tai made another attempt to get through to his friend Ben, but was then killed by "[[Ren (human)|Ren]]," the leader of the Knights of Ren. Enraged by Tai's death, Solo killed Ren and fell to the [[dark side of the Force]], becoming Kylo Ren. ==Biography== ===Luke's pupils=== {{Quote|All right. You've got brawn, brains… What was the third one? I already forgot his name.''"
"''Tai was Tai.|Ren and Ben Solo|[[The Rise of Kylo Ren 3|''The Rise of Kylo Ren'' 3]]}} [[File:LukeTeachingJedi-TheRiseOfKyloRen3.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Tai was a member of the new generation of Jedi that was trained by Luke Skywalker.]] During the [[New Republic Era]], [[Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker]] tried to restore the [[Jedi Order]] by [[Jedi training|training]] a new generation in the ways of [[the Force]].''[[Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker: The Visual Dictionary]]'' Tai was one of Skywalker's [[Padawan|apprentices]], along with [[Hennix]], [[Voe]], and [[Ben Solo]]. On one occasion, the four Jedi lifted [[Stone|rocks]] under the supervision of Master Skywalker on the grounds of the [[Jedi Temple of Luke Skywalker|Jedi temple]] where they trained. Around [[24 ABY]], Tai and Solo talked about the latter's decision to hide so much about himself. When Ben told him that he did so because of the pressures of living up to his [[Skywalker family|family's]] legacy, Tai assured him that he needed to be who he really was and that he wasn't as bad as he thought. Comforted, Solo asked him if he was really sure about his words, leading Tai to reiterate him that he shouldn't be afraid of what other people thought about him and just be himself, as the rest would follow. ===The Temple's destruction=== {{Quote|Ben, please. The story you're telling us…it can't possibly be true. There must be more to what happened. The Temple, Master Luke, the other students…just talk to us. It can't be as bad as what you're saying.|Tai, to Ben Solo|}} [[File:TaiConfrontsBenSolo-TheRiseOfKyloRen1.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Tai confronted Ben Solo and tried to understand his actions.]] In [[28 ABY]], Tai was on an off-[[Planet|world]] mission{{SW|url=news/marvel-star-wars-the-rise-of-kylo-ren-interview|text=The Creators of Marvel's ''Star Wars: The Rise of Kylo Ren'' on Ben Solo's Turn}} with Voe and Hennix. By the [[time]] they returned to [[Ossus]], the [[Jedi temple]] was [[Destruction of the Jedi Temple|destroyed]]. They confronted Solo amidst the [[Fire|burning]] ruins of the Jedi temple, having sensed only his presence in the Force. Solo, who believed their master tried to murder him in his sleep, told the students that he [[Death|killed]] Skywalker in self-defense. Tai cautioned restraint, hoping to learn more about what had transpired from Solo's perspective, but the others drew their [[lightsaber]]s and attempted to subdue Solo by force. After Solo used the Force to overpower them, including Tai, the three Jedi returned to their [[starship]] ''[[Verity]]'' to prevent Solo's escape. Tai warned Voe against pursuing Solo, knowing that he came from a [[Skywalker family|family]] that boasted some of the most renown [[pilot]]s in [[the galaxy]]. Solo ultimately escaped and found sanctuary with [[Snoke]], having disabled the ''Verity'' with his own vessel, the [[Grimtaash (starship)|''Grimtaash'']]. Although the three Jedi agreed to continue pursuing Solo, Tai proposed informing Solo's [[Parent|mother]], [[Leia Skywalker Organa Solo|Leia Organa]], about the situation. He was overruled by his colleagues, who believed they needed to learn the full story before involving anyone else. They traveled to the [[Elphrona Outpost|Jedi outpost]] on [[Elphrona]] where they found Solo with a [[Helmet|mask]] that once belonged to [[Ren (human)|Ren]], the leader of the [[Knights of Ren]]. Tai, Voe, and Hennix approached him with lightsabers drawn and warned him that there was nowhere left to go.[[The Rise of Kylo Ren 2|''The Rise of Kylo Ren'' 2]] ===Battle of Elphrona=== {{Quote|I don't care about where Ben Solo's path takes him, Tai. I only care about where it ''ends''.''"
"''I know, Voe. I think… I think he's lost.|Voe and Tai|}} [[File:ElphronaOutpostDestruction-TheRiseOfKyloRen3.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The skirmish at Elphrona.]] With no other option, Solo [[Battle of Elphrona|engaged in a duel]] against Tai, Voe and Hennix. During the duel, Solo [[Force push|shoved]] Tai against some rocks with the Force before jumping away to flee. Regaining composure, Tai saw how Voe and Hennix followed Solo to a cliff to subdue him only for Solo to push Voe off the cliff to then [[Force Stasis|freeze]] her amidst her fall. However, Hennix threw his [[Hennix's lightsaber|lightsaber]] from behind to kill Solo, leading the conflicted apprentice to let go Voe and redirect Hennix's weapon back to him. Tai did his best to slow Voe's fall with the Force, but Hennix was already dead. Before they could do anything, Solo ordered them to enter into the Jedi outpost. Tai tried to ask Solo about Hennix's fate, but Solo insisted that it didn't matter anymore and pushed them into the outpost, then sealing the entrance with rocks. Long after Solo left Elphrona for [[Varnak]], Tai and Voe pushed the rocks off their way. Upon retrieving his own lightsaber and Hennix's, Tai told Voe that he had read Solo's mind and knew about his plans to meet the [[Knights of Ren]] so he could find his true path. When Voe assured him that she didn't care where Ben's path took him but how it would end, Tai agreed with her and declared that he thought their former friend to be lost. ===Last stand on the Minemoon=== [[File:TaisDeath-TheRiseOfKyloRen4.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Tai dies on Minemoon.]] Tai and Voe made their way to the [[Minemoon]], where the Knights were in the midst of [[Skirmish on the Minemoon|attacking]] a group of [[Mimbanese]] miners in order to steal the [[Mindsplinter]], a powerful Force artifact. Tai called out to his former colleague but Solo was determined to prove his worth to Ren and his Knights. While Voe went to aid the Mimbaneses miners, Tai attempted to use his special bond with Solo to reason with him. However, Ben charged at him with his lightsaber.[[The Rise of Kylo Ren 4|''The Rise of Kylo Ren'' 4]] Tai told Solo that he found him through the Force and chastised him for turning his back on the [[Light side of the Force|light side]], prompting Solo to reply that he was carving his new path. Tai responded that it was not yet too late for Solo to turn around, saying that every path goes in two directions. When Tai argued about the ability to chose, Ben replied that both the light and dark sides of the Force prevented him from controlling his destiny. As the dueling progressed, the two moved over a bridge. Unwilling to give up on Solo, Tai said it was not too late to turn on the light side and invited him to help defeat the Knights of Ren. Seeking to reach out to Solo, Tai laid down his lightsaber and urged Ben to choose between killing and sparing him. Before Solo could respond, the Knights of Ren's leader Ren used the Force to break Tai's neck, killing him. Enraged by his friend's death, Solo wielded Tai's lightsaber [[Jar'Kai|in conjunction]] with his [[Kylo Ren's lightsaber|own]] and used it to attacked and killed Ren, falling to the [[dark side of the Force]]. Solo then killed Voe and became the Knight's new leader, taking on the name "Kylo Ren" and bleeding his [[kyber crystal]]. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Don't be afraid of what other people will think. Just… be who you are. The rest will follow.|Tai, to Ben Solo|}} Tai was a [[human]] [[Gender|male]] with [[Color|pale]] skin and blue [[eye]]s. He had dark colored eyebrows, but no [[hair]] on his head. He wore the brown [[Jedi apparel|Jedi robes]] typical of members of the Jedi Order. A Jedi apprentice, Tai had faith in Jedi Master Luke Skywalker and believed that he would not be able to do anything like trying to kill somebody. Tai was also friends with Ben Solo, his master's nephew and the Jedi temple's prize student. Unlike Voe and Hennix, Tai was able to talk with Ben about his insecurities and helped him by suggesting that he should be like he truly was instead of acting differently to live up to his family's legacy. Tai trusted Ben Solo and did not believe he would willingly kill his uncle or their fellow Jedi. Even when the others sought to subdue Solo through physical force, he attempted to speak with him to understand what happened and was sympathetic to his struggles. However, following Hennix's accidental death at Solo's hands, Tai concluded that his former friend was lost and agreed with Voe to track him down so they could kill him. Despite the loss of Hennix, Tai attempted to reason with Solo and bring him back to the light side, by appealing to the former bond of friendship between the two classmates. Tai even attempted to convince Solo to choose between killing or sparing him, which he equated to the tension between the light and dark side. Though Solo had rejected the Jedi Order, he respected Tai enough that he could not bring himself to kill his former classmate. ==Powers and abilities== {{Quote|Are you all right, Voe? I did my best to slow you with the Force, but I'm not as—''"
"''I'm ''fine'', Tai.|Tai and Voe|}} [[File:Tai-TheRiseOfKyloRen1.png|thumb|left|200px|Tai could sense Ben Solo through the Force.]] As a Jedi, Tai was [[Force-sensitive|sensitive]] to the Force, though not as gifted as Ben Solo. Through the Force, he had the [[Force power|ability]] to sense the presence of other [[Sentience|sentient]] beings on the surface of a planet from [[Realspace|space]]. He was a highly skilled [[Telepathy|telepath]], allowing him to sense the emotions of others as well as [[Mind probe (Force power)|reach into]] the minds of other individuals to search for information. He would come to sense Ben Solo's emotional distress throughout their childhood and, during their second encounter after the young fallen Jedi fled Skywalker's temple, was strong enough to penetrate Ben's mind for a brief time and learned of his next location, which allowed him and Voe to track him. He also knew how to use a type of [[Force healing]] where he would take on the pain of an injured being so that they would not feel it themselves, although he could not do it successfully when emotionally distracted. Tai was also a competent lightsaber duelist who was able to fight Ben Solo in combat. However, he was no match for the darksider Ren's powers. ==Equipment== [[File:TaisLightsaber-TheRiseOfKyloRen3.jpg|thumb|Tai's lightsaber]] Tai wore tan [[Jedi apparel|Jedi robes]] with a brown [[cloak]]. He possessed a blue-bladed [[Tai's lightsaber|lightsaber]] with a metallic silver hilt with two stacked sphere-like shapes near the emitter. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|The Quarren Jedi student is named Hennix. The follically-changed [sic] guy is Tai, and the gal is Voe. They're all cool, and they're all good at different things, and they all have different relationships with Ben Solo.|Charles Soule|{{Twitter|CharlesSoule|status/1204785701197352965|[[Charles Soule]]|date=2019-12-11|archivedate=20211003003609}}}} Tai first appeared in the [[2019]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] [[The Rise of Kylo Ren 1|''The Rise of Kylo Ren'' 1]] written by [[Charles Soule]], the first issue of [[Marvel Comics|Marvel's]] ''[[Star Wars: The Rise of Kylo Ren]]'' mini-series. Although Tai had blue eyes throughout ''The Rise of Kylo Ren'' 1, in one panel they appeared brown. ==Appearances== *[[The Rise of Kylo Ren 1|''The Rise of Kylo Ren'' 1]] {{1st}} *[[The Rise of Kylo Ren 2|''The Rise of Kylo Ren'' 2]] *[[The Rise of Kylo Ren 3|''The Rise of Kylo Ren'' 3]] {{Flash}} *[[The Rise of Kylo Ren 4|''The Rise of Kylo Ren'' 4]] *[[Legacy of Vader 10|''Legacy of Vader'' 10]] {{Vision|Kylo Ren}} *[[The Rise of Skywalker Adaptation 1|''The Rise of Skywalker Adaptation'' 1]] {{Flash}} *[[The Rise of Skywalker Adaptation 5|''The Rise of Skywalker Adaptation'' 5]] {{Flash}} ==Sources== *{{SW|url=news/marvel-star-wars-the-rise-of-kylo-ren-interview|text=The Creators of Marvel's ''Star Wars: The Rise of Kylo Ren'' on Ben Solo's Turn}} *{{SW|url=news/the-rise-of-kylo-ren-3-preview|text=Ben Solo Seeks Out the Knights of Ren in ''The Rise of Kylo Ren'' #3 - Exclusive}} *{{EncyclopediaCite|Luke Skywalker}} *{{EncyclopediaCite|Kylo Ren and Other Followers of the Dark Side}} *''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |el=Τάι |es=Tai |pl=Tai }} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Jedi trainees of the Jedi Order]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Ossus residents]]
